heading: 9.7.1.18.Integer Arithmetic Instructions:brev
content:
`brev`

Bit reverse.

Syntax

```
brev.type  d, a;

.type = { .b32, .b64 };
```

Description

Perform bitwise reversal of input.

Semantics

```
msb = (.type==.b32) ? 31 : 63;

for (i=0; i<=msb; i++) {
    d[i] = a[msb-i];
}
```

PTX ISA Notes

Introduced in PTX ISA version 2.0.

Target ISA Notes

`brev` requires `sm_20` or higher.

Examples

```
brev.b32  d, a;
```
